message:
revert(live): restore unconditional visibility on final render

Reverts the earlier interactive-only check for final render visibility.
The original behavior (always setting Visible on stop()) is needed for
correct cleanup in all terminal scenarios. Also simplifies the render
hook condition by removing the started flag check - the transient flag
is sufficient for determining output behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
